title: leocus caillei
intro: Leocus caillei, also known as the 'African geranium' or 'Geranium caillei', is a plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The medicinal properties of Leocus caillei lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, exhibit antiseptic properties, and act as a diuretic. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including treating urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Leocus caillei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
